description_long: This is a large, robust hippopotamus with a barrel-shaped body, thick grayish skin, and short, sturdy legs. Its mouth is wide open, displaying large, prominent tusks and a pinkish interior, which is characteristic of a hippo's threat display. The skin appears mostly smooth but with some natural folds and creases, especially around the neck and limbs. The eyes, ears, and nostrils are positioned high on the head, allowing the animal to see and breathe while mostly submerged. The tail is short and slightly tapered, and the feet are broad with visible toes. The overall appearance is that of a powerful, semi-aquatic mammal adapted for life in and around water.
description: A large, gray hippopotamus with thick skin, open mouth showing tusks, and a barrel-shaped body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide-open mouth, large tusks, and the high placement of eyes and nostrils.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, thick skin folds, and open mouth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, short tail, and sturdy hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open mouth, body shape, and skin texture.
